headlines.title: Sudanese Army Drone Strikes East Darfur Hospital Kills 64 Wounds 89
headlines.summary: Sudanese army launched drone attack on hospital in East Darfur killing 64 people including children and medical staff wounding 89 more per WHO. Affects war-torn civilians seeking care. Signals escalation in targeting healthcare; prompts calls for accountability.

headlines.title: New Mexico Jury Fines Meta $375 Million for Child Safety Violations
headlines.summary: Jury finds Meta violates state law harms children’s mental health safety through unconscionable practices exploiting vulnerabilities with thousands violations. Impacts young users platforms like Instagram Facebook. Sets precedent for tech accountability.

framings.angle: Focused on $375 million fine liability in child exploitation case as potential bellwether
Emphasized jury ruling Meta harms children’s mental health safety via unconscionable trade practices
Covered landmark verdict after seven-week trial on consumer protection child safety violations

headlines.title: NATO Mounts First Coordinated Response After Suspected Sabotage Severs Baltic Sea Cable
headlines.summary: NATO activates first coordinated operation following severance of deep-sea cable in Baltic Sea amid suspected sabotage campaign on infrastructure. Affects alliance security communications. Raises hybrid threat concerns next drills investigations.

headlines.title: SpaceX Launches Crew-10 Astronauts to Retrieve NASA Pair Stuck on ISS Nine Months
headlines.summary: SpaceX Falcon 9 launched four astronauts from Kennedy Space Center Friday to reach ISS Saturday relieve Butch Wilmore Suni Williams stuck since June. Routine rotation enables return. Boosts US space access reliability.

headlines.title: US Ecuador Airstrike Destroys Dairy Farm Mistaken for Drug Cartel Training Camp
headlines.summary: US military assisted Ecuador bombing site villagers identify as dairy farm not armed group camp. Affects local farmers innocent residents. Prompts questions on intelligence accuracy in anti-drug operations.

headlines.title: OpenAI Discontinues Sora AI Video Generator Amid Deepfake Video Concerns
headlines.summary: OpenAI shuts down Sora app plans preserve user content shifts focus to areas like coding tools. Impacts creators fearing deepfakes. Addresses misuse risks influences AI ethics regulations.

framings.angle: Reported shutdown of viral app sparked deepfake concerns with plans for user content preservation
Framed as first major step refocusing business on lucrative tools like coding amid deepfakes

headlines.title: Investigators Probe Attacks on Jewish Schools and Sites Across European Countries
headlines.summary: Attacks target Jewish schools property in multiple Europe countries heighten community fears suspicions point to Iran. Affects Jewish populations security. Drives international probes amid rising antisemitism tensions.

headlines.title: Israeli Strikes Kill Nine in Southern Lebanon Towns and Refugee Camp
headlines.summary: Israeli forces strike towns Palestinian refugee camp near Sidon kill six plus three elsewhere in south Lebanon. Affects Lebanese civilians refugees. Occurs amid Trump ceasefire optimism for Iran war.

headlines.title: Pentagon Deploys 2000 Troops to Middle East US Proposes 15-Point Plan Iran Opens Hormuz
headlines.summary: Pentagon sends 2,000 airborne troops for options as Trump admin delivers 15-point ceasefire proposal via Pakistan; Iran permits non-hostile oil vessels through Hormuz. Impacts global energy security war dynamics. Awaits Tehran response.
headlines.previousContext: US bolsters military presence proposes ceasefire amid confusion over talks; Iran signals de-escalation by easing key strait access

framings.angle: Tied 2,000 troop deployment to 15-point proposal sent via Pakistan for Trump options
Clarified confusion from Trump progress claims Iran denials on ongoing war talks
Detailed US 15-point plan offer to end war conveyed through Pakistan channel
Paired US 15-point plan with Iran opening Hormuz to non-hostile vessels

headlines.title: Palestinians Cross Military Zone Return to Northern Gaza After Hostage Deadlock Breaks
headlines.summary: Israel permits displaced Gazans cross bisecting military zone into north after hostage release impasse resolves. Affects hundreds thousands returnees. Eases humanitarian strains signals potential aid access gains.
headlines.previousContext: Israel breaks hostage release deadlock allows zone crossing enabling on-foot returns

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Troops Enter Goma City One Million Displaced Inside
headlines.summary: Rebels defeat Congolese army enter Goma trigger gunfire shelling trap over one million displaced in aid hub city. Affects residents refugees. Threatens humanitarian crisis worsens regional instability.
headlines.previousContext: Rebels advance into city core overrunning defenses causing shelling with one million now sheltering within
